title: halimium scabrosum
intro: Halimium scabrosum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Halimium scabrosum include its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and calm muscle spasms. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
